code: import{useEffect}from'react';import{getSocket}from'../utils/socket';import useStore from'../store/useStore';export const useSocket=()=>{const{addMessage,updateMessage,updateTask,addDecision,setTyping,activeChannel}=useStore();useEffect(()=>{const socket=getSocket();if(!socket)return;const onNewMessage=msg=>addMessage(msg);const onResolved=msg=>updateMessage(msg);const onTaskUp=task=>updateTask(task);const onTypingStart=_ref=>{let{userId,userName,channelId}=_ref;if(channelId===(activeChannel===null||activeChannel===void 0?void 0:activeChannel._id))setTyping(channelId,userId,userName,true);};const onTypingStop=_ref2=>{let{userId,channelId}=_ref2;setTyping(channelId,userId,null,false);};socket.on('message:new',onNewMessage);socket.on('message:resolved',onResolved);socket.on('task:updated',onTaskUp);socket.on('typing:start',onTypingStart);socket.on('typing:stop',onTypingStop);return()=>{socket.off('message:new',onNewMessage);socket.off('message:resolved',onResolved);socket.off('task:updated',onTaskUp);socket.off('typing:start',onTypingStart);socket.off('typing:stop',onTypingStop);};},[activeChannel,addMessage,updateMessage,updateTask,addDecision,setTyping]);};
